LanguageData.RICS.CIS.Global.Tooltip: Configure global chat and economy settings
LanguageData.RICS.CIS.Economy.Tooltip: Configure karma and coin economy settings
LanguageData.RICS.CIS.GameEvents.Tooltip: Manage events, traits, store items and cooldowns
LanguageData.RICS.CIS.Rewards.Tooltip: Configure channel points and lootbox rewards
LanguageData.RICS.CIS.AI.Tooltip: Configure external AI chatbot integration (Masie / Ollama bots etc.)
LanguageData.RICS.AI.Title: AI Chatbot Integration
LanguageData.RICS.AI.Description: Connect RICS to an external AI bot (e.g. local Python + Ollama "Masie" bot). RICS provides game state, events, and command execution hooks. You must run and host your own bot.
LanguageData.RICS.AI.ListenerURL: RICS Listener Endpoint (bot polls this for /gamestate etc.):
LanguageData.RICS.AI.BotResponseURL: Bot Response URL (RICS posts !chatbot commands here):
LanguageData.RICS.AI.BotName: Bot Display Name (used in chat and as AI "viewer"):
LanguageData.RICS.AI.SendGameState: Send full game state snapshot with prompts
LanguageData.RICS.AI.SendChatHistory: Send recent chat history with prompts
LanguageData.RICS.AI.PushEndpoint: Game State Push Endpoint (POST target for bot):
LanguageData.RICS.AI.CanExecuteCommands: Allow bot to execute in-game commands via file interface (powerful but risky)
LanguageData.RICS.AI.WarningExecute: ⚠️ Enabling command execution lets the bot run !buy, !raid etc. Only enable with trusted bots.
LanguageData.RICS.AI.SetupHelp: Setup: Run your Python bot (e.g. Masie V9) that polls http://127.0.0.1:17888/gamestate and responds on /chat. Use local Ollama for LLM.
LanguageData.RICS.AI.ClearLeftoverLabel: Clear any stale .json files left by crashed external bot (safe).
